title: The Caribbean Heist
overview: Five women move to Miami Beach in search of a better life but find the reality of the streets hard to overcome. The struggling gangster driven economy makes things difficult for the ladies so they decide to take a few risks by robbing rich business men they befriend who make millions of dollars illegally.
